ddls:
CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic program */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree awarded upon completion (e.g. Bachelor of Arts) */,
  "medium_of_instruction" TEXT /* Medium of instruction for the program */,
  "duration_years" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "tuition_fees_min" INTEGER /* Minimum tuition fees per semester */,
  "tuition_fees_max" INTEGER /* Maximum tuition fees per semester */,
  "total_fee" INTEGER /* Approximate total program fee */,
  "fee_structure_details" TEXT /* Details regarding the fee structure */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the program */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for admission */,
  "career_outcomes" TEXT /* Potential career outcomes for graduates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "faculty" TEXT /* Faculty to which the department belongs */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty member */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "faculty_title" TEXT /* Title of the faculty member (e.g. Professor, Lecturer) */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program in which the student is enrolled */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected date of graduation */,
  "current_semester" TEXT /* Current semester of study */,
  "cumulative_gpa" TEXT /* Cumulative GPA */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrolled student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the enrollment (e.g., active, withdrawn) */,
  "academic_status" TEXT /* Academic status of the student (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tuition_fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee record */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program to which the fee applies */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester (e.g., Fall 2023) */,
  "fee_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of tuition fee for that semester */,
  "payment_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tuition_fees_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advisors" (
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advisor record */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member serving as the advisor */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student being advised */,
  "advising_start_date" TEXT /* Date advising started */,
  "advising_end_date" TEXT /* Date advising ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advisors_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advisors_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program to which the requirement applies */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the requirement (e.g., number of credits needed) */,
  "credits_required" INTEGER /* Number of credits required for the program */,
  "gpa_requirement" TEXT /* Minimum GPA required for graduation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_requirements_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_curriculum" (
  "curriculum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each curriculum record */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program to which the curriculum applies */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "semester_offered" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("curriculum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_curriculum_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_curriculum_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome record */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program to which the outcome applies */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the expected outcome */,
  "assessment_method" TEXT /* Method of assessing the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_outcomes_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_accreditation" (
  "accreditation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accreditation record */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program to which the accreditation applies */,
  "accrediting_agency" TEXT /* Name of the accrediting agency */,
  "accreditation_date" TEXT /* Date of accreditation */,
  "accreditation_valid_until" TEXT /* Date until which the accreditation is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accreditation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_accreditation_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)
